title: 🧠 AI Evolution: On-Device & Custom Cloud Access! 🚀
message: We're taking your career growth to the next level by bringing advanced AI power right into your pocket, whether you're online or offline! 🌿
points: 🧠 On-Device AI Models: Run 'Resumate Standard' or 'Resumate High Power' models locally on your device for private, offline AI assistance.
☁️ Custom Cloud API: Added full support for personal Gemini API keys—use your own keys for unlimited, personalized cloud AI power.
⚙️ Redesigned AI Settings: A dedicated, intuitive tab to manage your models, tokens, and API keys effortlessly.
⚡ Lightning-Fast Performance: Optimized AI engine handling for smoother, faster resume auditing and career tool usage.

title: ✨ The Update Hub is Here! 🚀
message: We've crafted a beautiful new way to keep you perfectly in sync with our latest AI tools and resume features. 🌿
points: 🔔 New In-App Updater: Get instantly notified about fresh features directly from your home screen.
📖 Interactive Changelogs: Discover exactly what's new the moment you update your app.
🔄 Manual Check: Instantly check for new updates anytime with the new icon in your App Bar.
⚡ Performance Boost: Under-the-hood tweaks for an even smoother, distraction-free experience.
